name: cannibal.live_world_exposed_sight_avoid_mcw
description: Scenario 3 for cannibal camp night-raid live matrix: start from exposed-scout footing, seed a camp-shaped cannibal_camp, advance a bounded 20-turn live window, and prove the cannibal-specific local gate treats recent sight/exposure as hold_off/non-combat/non-shakedown rather than attack_now or visible-beeline credit. The inherited bandit_camp reposition artifact, if present, is a control/source-fixture artifact and must not satisfy cannibal proof.

steps.label: post_load_exposed_sightline_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams cannibal exposed sight-avoid fixture; this is startup/load evidence plus before-action screen proof, not feature closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later exposure/sight-avoid artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: disable_safe_mode_for_bounded_exposed_window
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode has been toggled so the bounded local scout/stalker window can advance under player control
steps.failure_rule: If this input is unproven, subsequent turn advancement cannot be credited as controlled scenario action.

steps.label: advance_20_turns_for_exposed_sight_avoid
steps.expected_visible_fact: bounded 20-turn exposed-scout window has completed; feature credit depends on same-run cannibal_camp local_gate evidence showing recent exposure, hold_off posture, no shakedown, and no combat_forward. Any bandit_camp reposition line from the inherited source fixture is control/source-fixture evidence only.
steps.failure_rule: If the bounded window is unproven or the same-run cannibal_camp local_gate line lacks recent exposure/hold_off/non-combat evidence, this scenario is not cannibal product proof; do not credit bandit_camp reposition artifacts as cannibal behavior.

steps.label: open_save_quit_prompt_after_exposed_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit prompt is visible after the exposed-scout window, proving the game remained responsive after bounded reposition/hold-off probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit cannot be opened, the run is not a clean audited probe.

steps.label: confirm_save_quit_after_exposed_probe
steps.expected_visible_fact: save/quit confirmation completed after the exposed-scout probe
steps.failure_rule: If save/quit confirmation is unproven, preserve artifacts but do not count the run as fully green without reviewing cleanup status.

evidence_contract.claim: a recently exposed cannibal scout/stalker holds off through the live local gate instead of receiving combat-forward or visible-beeline credit
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for cannibal behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, input ledger, bounded-window ledger, cannibal site match, recent-exposure state, hold_off posture, non-shakedown/non-combat artifact, or visible-beeline hold-off note is missing or non-green. Bandit_camp reposition artifacts in this fixture are explicitly non-crediting controls.
